templates.name: Feature Implementation Cycle
templates.description: Reusable 15-step sequence for implementing any feature. The orchestrator instantiates this template for each feature in the implementation_backlog, injecting the feature's specific context.

parameters.feature_id: ID of the feature being implemented
parameters.user_story_ids: List of user story IDs this feature implements

steps.name: spec_review
steps.instruction: Review all relevant specifications for feature '{feature_name}'. Pull from context: user stories, screens, API endpoints, database tables, business rules. Identify gaps, ambiguities, conflicts. Output: feature_spec_summary with issues_found. If blocking ambiguities exist, trigger needs_clarification.

steps.name: implementation_plan
steps.instruction: Create ordered implementation plan for this feature based on feature_spec_summary. Determine which steps are needed: set needs_db_migration, needs_backend, needs_frontend as true/false. For each needed step: what to implement, which files to create/modify, key constraints. If this is a backend-only feature (API, data pipeline, CLI), set needs_frontend=false. If no new tables/columns needed, set needs_db_migration=false. Output feature_impl_plan.

steps.name: database_migration
steps.instruction: Create a reversible database migration for this feature. Add tables, columns, indexes, or constraints as specified in the feature_impl_plan and database_schema. Run the migration locally. Verify the schema matches expectations. Verify rollback works cleanly. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write the migration here, exact path): migrations/versions/{feature_id}_initial.py

steps.name: backend_service
steps.instruction: Implement backend for this feature: data model (fields, validation, types, relations), business logic service layer (enforce business rules, throw typed AppErrors), and any feature-specific middleware (file upload, rate limiting, feature flags). Follow patterns from implementation_context. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATHS (write actual files at exactly these paths via the write_file tool): backend/app/models/{feature_id}.py, backend/app/services/{feature_id}_service.py.

steps.name: backend_endpoints
steps.instruction: Implement API endpoints per openapi_spec: route handlers with middleware, request validation, response formatting, error handling. Each endpoint must check auth, validate input, call service, return proper response format. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write the router via write_file at exactly this path): backend/app/routes/{feature_id}.py.

steps.name: backend_tests
steps.instruction: Write unit tests for service layer: happy path, validation failures, auth failures, business rules, edge cases. Target >90% branch coverage. Write integration tests for API endpoints with real test database: success, auth, validation, not found, pagination, filtering. Run all tests and verify they pass. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write tests via write_file at exactly this path): backend/tests/test_{feature_id}.py.

steps.name: frontend_state
steps.instruction: Set up frontend for this feature: TypeScript types (API response/request, form, state, component props), API client functions using base client, and state management (query hooks, mutation hooks with optimistic updates and cache invalidation). Follow patterns from implementation_context. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATHS (write actual files via write_file at exactly these paths): frontend/src/types/{feature_id}.ts, frontend/src/api/{feature_id}.ts, frontend/src/state/{feature_id}.ts.

steps.name: frontend_components
steps.instruction: Implement feature-specific UI components per screen_specifications using design system components and tokens. Include responsive behavior per responsive_spec at all breakpoints. Implement accessibility per accessibility_spec: headings, ARIA, keyboard nav, focus order. Implement forms with validation, error display, submit handling if applicable. Implement loading (Skeleton), error (inline + toast), and empty states. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write the components index via write_file at exactly this path): frontend/src/components/{feature_id}/index.tsx.

steps.name: frontend_pages
steps.instruction: Assemble pages: compose components, wire data bindings, action handlers, conditional rendering, route parameters. Implement all page states: loading, error, empty, success. Connect to routes per information_architecture. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write the page via write_file at exactly this path): frontend/src/app/{feature_id}/page.tsx.

steps.name: frontend_tests
steps.instruction: Write frontend unit tests for utilities, hooks, state management. Write component tests: render, interaction, conditional rendering, accessibility, page states (loading/error/empty). Run all tests and verify they pass. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write the test file via write_file at exactly this path): frontend/src/__tests__/{feature_id}.test.tsx.

steps.name: e2e_tests
steps.instruction: Write E2E tests covering: happy path CRUD flow, error handling, auth integration. Each test should simulate a complete user flow. Tests should run in under 30 seconds each. Use the project's E2E framework. REQUIRED OUTPUT PATH (write the spec file via write_file at exactly this path): e2e/{feature_id}.spec.ts.

steps.name: code_review
steps.instruction: Review all code for this feature: architecture compliance (does it follow implementation_context patterns?), code quality, error handling, security (no injection, proper auth checks), performance (no N+1, proper indexing), test quality (coverage, edge cases), type safety, accessibility. Output code_review_result with status (approved/changes_requested) and issues list. If changes_requested, the fixer agent will apply fixes and re-submit.

steps.name: staging_deploy
steps.instruction: [NEEDS-REAL-TOOLS] Per-feature staging deploy requires a real CD trigger + health-check adapter (e.g. mr_roboto.run_cmd against the CI provider, plus an http_request with retry against the staging URL). Until those land, do NOT claim 'health_check_passed' — surface a needs_clarification with the merge commit SHA and ask the operator to confirm. Merge feature branch, wait for CI/CD, verify deployment succeeds and health check passes on staging.

steps.name: staging_validation
steps.instruction: Mechanical: HTTP-check the staging URL emitted by feat.13 staging_deploy. Reads the per-feature staging_deployment_result artifact, pulls the `url` field, runs mr_roboto.http_check with retry/backoff (5 attempts). Pass requires the final response to be 2xx. Visual / multi-breakpoint / interactive smoke checks are NOT covered here — they need a Playwright adapter that hasn't landed. The artifact_schema reflects this honestly: only smoke_tests_passed is asserted.

steps.name: quality_checks
steps.instruction: Run final quality checks: verify all tests pass, check code coverage meets threshold, run accessibility scan (axe-core) on new pages, run performance check on new endpoints. Verify all steps passed. Update implementation_backlog status to 'completed'. Check if sprint boundary reached.
